headline: Is FICO’s New Debt and Credit Insights Lab Quietly Rewriting Its Moat Story (FICO)?
summary: In March 2026, Fair Isaac Corporation completed a private offering of US$1.00 billion in 6.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034, primarily to refinance existing debt, fully redeem US$400.00 million of 5.25% senior notes maturing in 2026, and fund broader corporate purposes including potential share repurchases. Separately, FICO launched its FICO Score Credit Insights Lab, an interactive analytics platform that lets lenders test new scoring models, alternative data strategies, and...
